title: remote untag: support digests
body:
Fix a bug when remotely untagging an image via tag@digest.
The digest has been lost in the remote client and hence led
to a wrong behaviour on the server.

Fixes: #11557
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@edsantiago PTAL

@giuseppe, the e2e is failing/flaking on F33 since it's now emitting the following warning

> [+0922s]   Expected
[+0922s]       <string>: time=\"2021-09-20T07:26:16-05:00\" level=warning msg=\"Failed to add pause process to systemd sandbox cgroup: mkdir /sys/fs/cgroup/pids/user.slice/user-11433.slice/user@11433.service/user.slice: permission denied\"

Any suggestion how to proceed?
